prompt: I just created a new skill in Plugins/gaudi/src-gaudi/skills/telemetry-testing/SKILL.md. Can you make sure the gaudi.zip file is updated to include this new skill? Verify it worked.

assertions.text: telemetry-testing skill file is present in the regenerated zip
assertions.evidence: unzip -l confirms skills/telemetry-testing/SKILL.md exists in gaudi.zip

assertions.text: gaudi.zip has been updated (newer timestamp than before)
plugin.json is valid and parseable from within the zip
assertions.evidence: All quality checks passed including JSON validation

assertions.text: All 9 skills are included in the repackaged zip
assertions.evidence: Inventory shows all skills present: bi-reporting, competitive-intelligence, data-modeling, data-privacy, gaudi-telemetry, product-management, security, telemetry-testing, user-experience
